overview.what: A high-performance personal blog built with the Next.js App Router. It supports markdown-based content with MDX for interactive components within posts, features automatic RSS generation, and is optimized for SEO.
overview.how_it_works: The platform uses static site generation (SSG) to pre-render posts at build time. It parses MDX files from a local directory using `next-mdx-remote`, extracting frontmatter for metadata and using Tailwind Typography for consistent styling.
what_you_learn: Next.js App Router and Static Generation
Building a dynamic tag-based filtering system
SEO optimization with Meta tags and RSS

files.description: Main blog index with static data fetching.
